name: @unchartedfr/zapcode-ai
description: AI SDK integration for Zapcode — let LLMs write and execute TypeScript safely

scripts.test:e2e: npm run sync-local-binding && npm run build && node tests/agent-scenarios.mjs && node tests/durable-sessions.mjs && node tests/tool-errors.mjs && node tests/parallel.mjs && node tests/driver.mjs && node tests/ai-session.mjs && node tests/type-check.mjs && node tests/agent-dx.mjs && node tests/tool-side-effects.mjs && node tests/stress.mjs && node tests/workflow.mjs && node tests/marshalling.mjs
scripts.test:e2e-conformance: npm run sync-local-binding && npm run build && for f in agent-integration tool-contract session-inputs session-workflows durable-serialization ai-sdk-adapters; do echo "# e2e-$f"; node tests/e2e-$f.mjs; done
scripts.test:e2e-full: npm run test:e2e && npm run test:e2e-conformance && npm run test:scenarios3 && node tests/differential.mjs
scripts.test:scenarios3: npm run sync-local-binding && npm run build && for f in scheduling support-triage etl compliance durable pricing inventory analytics knowledge statemachine; do echo "# scenarios3-$f"; node tests/scenarios3-$f.mjs; done
scripts.test:scenarios: npm run build && for f in data datetime text errors sessions; do echo "# scenarios-$f"; node tests/scenarios-$f.mjs || true; done
scripts.test:differential: npm run sync-local-binding && npm run build && node tests/differential.mjs
scripts.test:fuzz: npm run sync-local-binding && npm run build && node tests/fuzz-differential.mjs

author: Uncharted
